Module CST239Milestone
Package service

Class ShoppingCart

  • java.lang.Object
    • service.ShoppingCart
  • public class ShoppingCart
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the user's shopping cart. The cart tracks what the user intends to buy, but it does not manage stock. Stock is handled by InventoryManager, and StoreFront coordinates changes between them.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      ShoppingCart()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addItem​(java.lang.String productName, int qty)
      Adds an item to the cart.
      java.math.BigDecimal calculateTotal​(InventoryManager inventoryManager)
      Calculates the total cost of the current cart.
      void clear()
      Clears all items from the cart.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Integer> getItems()
      Returns a read-only view of the cart contents.
      void removeItem​(java.lang.String productName, int qty)
      Removes an item quantity from the cart.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • ShoppingCart

        public ShoppingCart()

    • Method Detail

      • addItem

        public void addItem​(java.lang.String productName,
                    int qty)
        Adds an item to the cart. This method only updates the cart. It does not check inventory stock. StoreFront is responsible for verifying stock before calling this.
        Parameters:
        productName - product name
        qty - quantity to add (must be > 0)

      • removeItem

        public void removeItem​(java.lang.String productName,
                       int qty)
        Removes an item quantity from the cart. If the removal brings the quantity down to zero, the item is removed completely.
        Parameters:
        productName - product name
        qty - quantity to remove (must be > 0)

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Clears all items from the cart. Used when the store is re-initialized or if a user checks out in a future milestone.

      • getItems

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Integer> getItems()
        Returns a read-only view of the cart contents. This prevents other classes from modifying the map directly.
        Returns:
        unmodifiable cart map

      • calculateTotal

        public java.math.BigDecimal calculateTotal​(InventoryManager inventoryManager)
        Calculates the total cost of the current cart. The cart only stores names and quantities, so we use InventoryManager to look up product prices. If an item is missing from inventory, that indicates a mismatch between inventory and cart and should be treated as an error.
        Parameters:
        inventoryManager - inventory manager used to lookup product prices
        Returns:
        total cost of all items in the cart
